main.description: Character original. The portable base with settings, stats, and portrait for a character owned by a player.

ownerDid.description: DID of the player who owns this character.

sheetSchemaRef.description: Reference to the character-sheet-schema this sheet conforms to. Required for active records; schema-less is legacy/import/recovery only.

rulesetNsid.description: Root NSID of the ruleset this character belongs to.

portraitBlob.description: Portrait image blob uploaded to the owner's repo.

stats.description: Structured stats payload conforming to fieldDefs when sheetSchemaRef is present; free-form JSON for legacy/import/recovery otherwise.

version.description: Monotonically increasing version counter. Starts at 1 on create.

createdAt.description: UTC datetime when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: UTC datetime when the record was last updated.
